_comment: Pinned per-rule doc-link metadata. Tier-1 (doc_links.test.ts, offline, always-on) asserts catalog<->snapshot parity, no legacy URL, and URL-shape/specificity invariants. Tier-2 (doc_links.live.test.ts, env-gated) additionally fetches `page` and checks liveness + `anchor`. `quality`: exact|close|weak|gap. `gap` rules are listed in `expectedUnpublished` and intentionally point at a page root until upstream publishes the page. `excerpt`/`contentHash` are filled by scripts/capture_doc_snapshot.ts once the live tier is wired; absent here.
